parameters.content:
Ecommerce generic flow

Step 1 Detection: date + eventCount, eventName filter only.
Step 2 Diagnosis: date + eventName + eventCount only when anomaly.

FastAPI: /api/v1/analyze/generic

## Unassigned Traffic Monitoring
Detection: date + sessionDefaultChannelGroup + sessions
Diagnosis: date + sessionSourceMedium + sessions filtered to Unassigned
Backend derives unassigned_session_share from raw rows.
